provenance.notes: Installed via Claude Code's official /plugin install claude-md-management@claude-plugins-official. This repo tracks provenance only; no files are copied. Plugin contents: skill (claude-md-improver) and command (revise-claude-md). Replaces the earlier split adoption at user/shared/skills/claude-md-improver/ and user/shared/commands/revise-claude-md.md, which is removed in the same commit.
